  <h1>
    Ubiquitous Game Engine
  </h1>

  <p>Current Version: 0.0.4</p>

</div>

Ubiquitous is an experiment - can I build a game engine that can be used to create and play multiple types of games, only using AI?

## What tools will be used

- Visual Studio 2026
- Copilot Claude Sonnet 4.5
- Midjourney (for images)

## The rules

1. Any work done in `src` will be completed by Copilot
2. If anything in `src` is modified manually, it will be documented
3. Copilot will be in "Agent" mode
4. Any changes/requests Copilot recommends will be accepted

## Development blog

This process will be documented in the [Development Blog](./devblog/README.md).
